title: Chronically unrealistic flights
subtitle: Two `dataset` panels feed the rest of the board. Visual panels read rows via `source` + `transform` so the heavy CTE chain executes twice, not seven times. Requires the `ontime.fact_ontime` table.

panels.title: Scored carrier/route combinations (raw)
panels.query: WITH base AS (SELECT Reporting_Airline AS carrier, concat(Origin, '→', Dest) AS route, FlightDate AS d, ArrDelayMinutes AS delay FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE Cancelled = 0 AND Year BETWEEN {{from_year}} AND {{to_year}} AND ArrDelayMinutes >= {{min_delay}}), scored AS (SELECT carrier, route, count() AS late_flights, avg(delay) AS avg_delay, quantile(0.9)(delay) AS p90_delay FROM base GROUP BY carrier, route HAVING late_flights >= 20) SELECT carrier, route, late_flights, avg_delay, p90_delay FROM scored ORDER BY late_flights DESC LIMIT 200

panels.title: Monthly flagged share (raw)
panels.query: WITH per_month AS (SELECT toStartOfMonth(FlightDate) AS month, countIf(ArrDelayMinutes >= {{min_delay}}) AS flagged, count() AS total FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE Cancelled = 0 AND Year BETWEEN {{from_year}} AND {{to_year}} GROUP BY month) SELECT toString(month) AS month, flagged, total, flagged / total AS flagged_share FROM per_month ORDER BY month

panels.title: Worst carriers by late flights
Monthly share of flights with delays at or above the threshold
